water.name: drinking water distribution network
water.description: Network of pipelines delivering potable water to consumers.

water.description: Facilities that treat raw water to meet drinking standards.

water.description: Facilities that treat sewage before environmental discharge.

water.description: Infrastructure that collects and conveys rainwater runoff.

water.name: irrigation water distribution system
water.description: Infrastructure that transfers water from sources to agricultural fields for crop irrigation.

transportation.description: Coastal facilities for ship docking and cargo handling.

transportation.description: Rail infrastructure for passenger and freight transport.

transportation.name: airports
transportation.description: Facilities supporting aircraft operations and air travel.

transportation.name: public transport systems
transportation.description: Organised transport services for mass passenger movement.

energy.description: Facilities generating electricity from various energy sources.

energy.description: Infrastructure delivering electricity from producers to users.

energy.name: renewable energy infrastructure
energy.description: Installations generating energy from renewable sources.

energy.name: refineries
energy.description: Facilities processing crude oil into usable fuels.

food.name: agricultural production
food.description: Cultivation of crops and livestock for food supply.

food.description: Facilities for storing agricultural and food products.

food.name: food processing facilities
food.description: Plants transforming raw food into consumable products.

food.name: local markets
food.description: Retail spaces for food and local product distribution.

health.name: pharmacies

health.description: Rapid-response medical care and ambulance services.

education.name: schools
education.description: Institutions providing primary and secondary education.

education.name: universities
education.description: Institutions providing higher education and research.

education.name: athletic centers
education.description: Facilities supporting sports, recreation, and physical activity.

environmental & ecosystem.name: wetlands, rivers, floodplains
environmental & ecosystem.description: Natural systems that store and regulate water, reducing flood risk and supporting biodiversity.

environmental & ecosystem.name: soil
environmental & ecosystem.description: Natural resource supporting vegetation growth, water filtration, and nutrient cycling.

environmental & ecosystem.name: urban green spaces
environmental & ecosystem.description: Vegetated areas within urban environments that provide cooling, recreation, and ecological benefits.

environmental & ecosystem.name: dunes, reefs
environmental & ecosystem.description: Natural coastal features that buffer wave energy and reduce erosion and storm surge impacts.

environmental & ecosystem.name: forests
environmental & ecosystem.description: Tree-dominated ecosystems providing carbon storage, erosion control, biodiversity, and climate regulation.

environmental & ecosystem.name: lagoons and freshwater lakes
environmental & ecosystem.description: Inland surface water bodies storing freshwater and supporting biodiversity, water supply, and local climate regulation.

environmental & ecosystem.name: groundwater resources
environmental & ecosystem.description: Subsurface freshwater reserves in aquifers supplying drinking water, irrigation, and ecosystem baseflow.
